item.title: Fat, drunk, and stupid is no way to go through life, Kevin
item.dc:creator: McPuffinStuff

item.title: On Workers' Day, let us not forget the BATTLE OF BLAIR MOUNTAIN (August, 1921) - the largest labor uprising in US history
item.description:
https://www.smithsonianmag.com/history/battle-blair-mountain-largest-labor-uprising-american-history-180978520/
10,000 coal miners battled 3,000 lawmen and strike breakers who were aimed at preventing their unionizing.
President Warren G. Harding sent in the army and West Virginia national guard to aid in putting down the uprising. Private planes and army bombers (Martin MB-1s) from Maryland were also used to drop bombs on the miners. An unexploded bomb was kept and later used by the miners as evidence in their defense.
Machine guns and gatlings were employed on both sides
Once the federal troops showed up, the miners refused to fire on them and they packed up to head home.
After the battle, 985 miners were indicted for murder, conspiracy to commit murder, accessory to murder, and treason against the State of West Virginia. Though the majority were acquitted by sympathetic juries, others were imprisoned for up to four years, with the last being paroled in 1925 (the unexploded bomb helped acquit several of them). Official casualties: 50 to 100 miners were killed, 30 law enforcement, 4 soldiers (they died when one of those planes bombing the miners crased on return flight)
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: I've been doing Funny Friday for 3 years now! Have some laughs and check out a dump of some of my favorites from the past year
item.description:
So it's now been 3 years of doing Funny Friday and putting out these silly little dumps. As always, I like to look back at the year that was and recap with some of my favorites from the year. This year was a little tough due to my job eating up all my time, but I hope you had some laughs along the way or enjoy this look back at it. As always, there'll be a link in the comments to a private folder with the more adult and NSFW humor there, so you don't see it someplace you shouldn't, so make sure to check that out.
His glorious purpose finally found him.
There aren't enough red flags in the universe. Worse, Shinji is colorblind.
Two months later: "Shit, was she flirting with me?!"
My dog died a few year ago and I don't have a cat, so this is the closest you get to a dog or cat tax. Hope you all had fun and have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Faith in Humanity :)
item.description: In September 2018, a nurse, Daryn Sturch, was driving in Indiana with her daughter when they came across a serious motorcycle crash involving members of the Milwaukee Iron riding group. She immediately stopped and used her medical training to help multiple riders who had severe, life-threatening injuries, staying with them until emergency services arrived. Some victims required an airlift to the hospital, but all of them survived, and many later credited her quick actions for saving their lives. After the incident, the bikers stayed in contact with Daryn to thank her, and a connection gradually formed between them. Then a year later, Sturch shared on Facebook that her daughter was running a lemonade stand for the summer. After a first attempt was rained out, members of the riding group encouraged her to try again. When she did, over 30 bikers unexpectedly arrived to support her, including several of the same people she had helped at the crash. They filled the stand and offered generous tips, turning a simple neighborhood setup into a powerful reunion and a way to show gratitude for the help they had once received.
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
oh i guess this got into my imgur folder. huh. okies.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things they wont use like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Video Memes Vol 5
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P

item.title: GovBrief Today #455
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson, third in line for the presidency, called on Republican-led statehouses today to redraw their congressional maps before November. Florida had already adopted a new Republican map hours before the Supreme Court ruling came down. Louisiana canceled a primary election that had already begun, so its legislature can redraw two majority-Black districts. By afternoon, Trump was on Truth Social telling Tennessee's governor to "PUSH HARD" on dismantling the state's only majority-Black congressional district. Up to 18 districts where Black and Hispanic voters outnumber white voters are now threatened because the Voting Rights Act no longer protects them. Memphis is the seat Trump named today. Call your state legislators and demand they stop putting their thumb on the scale. I've emailed 7,217 stories over 455 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Images, data, and easy-click links all on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260430-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr30 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/union-jack [3] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-medicaid [4] https://go.govbrief.today/wall-ancient-site [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pipeline [6] https://go.govbrief.today/la-vote-postponed [7] https://go.govbrief.today/gerrymander-call [8] https://go.govbrief.today/scotch-tariff [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ira [10] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-tuition [11] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-shutdown-ends [12] https://go.govbrief.today/orleans-sheriff [13] https://go.govbrief.today/student-loan-cap [14] https://go.govbrief.today/fisa-short [15] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-betting [16] https://go.govbrief.today/spahier-surggen [17] https://go.govbrief.today/fema-whistleblowers [18] https://go.govbrief.today/flock-demos [19] https://go.govbrief.today/medicare-portal [20] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-weapons [21] https://go.govbrief.today/makoka-brothers Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1674 (cranberry people)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Well. I made it to Friday.
This is why they want to create artificial uteruses.
I hope he's been targeted with cocktails more since the second one.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [while trying to kiss my eyeball] "Hey Pippin. Can we go?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) UNMUTE
item.description:
Our vet has an app now. All I had to do was log in with the same email and phone number we use at the vet, and it carried over all our pet's information. This made me laugh out loud. All they needed from me was a photo.
5 years ago, when we were walking our kid to school, we heard a loud, unsettling scream from what sounded like a distressed cat behind us. I hesitantly turned around, in fear that we were going to find a severely injured cat based on the volume and passion in her cry.
I looked around, but didn't see anything. Then, we heard the shriek again. It was coming from the top of a tree.
My husband coaxed her down, and she draped herself across his shoulder like butter. Notably relieved to have been rescued from the tree.
We brought her home, and she walked around the house like she owned the place...like she had already lived there her whole life. The other cats (Taxi and Peanut) would walk up to her, and hiss in her face, but Magoo remained unphased. Magoo was the absolute most defiant cat I had ever met in my life. She'd block the TV, or jump on counters, never batting an eye or acknowledging us when we'd tell her to get down. It took us a month to realize she wasn't a just a rebellious kitty, she was deaf!
Flashbang warning
Basket of Goo You can find Magoo updates as well as all the memes you can possibly download on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
